dct_title_s: Geologic map of the Coalinga and Guijarral Hills quadrangles, Fresno County, California
dct_alternative_sm: Geology Coalinga and Guijarral Hills quadrangle
dct_description_sm: by Thomas W. Dibblee, Jr. ; edited by John A. Minch.
Relief shown by contours and spot heights.

"Topographic base map from available USGS 7.5-minute quadrangle: Coalinga, CA 1956, photorevised 1979, DMA 1956 III NE -- Series V895; Guijarral Hills, CA 1956, photorevised 1971, AMS 1956 II NW -- Series V895."
Includes quadrangle location map, index to adjacent 7.5 minute quadrangles, and index to sources of geology.
dct_publisher_sm: Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History
